---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in bbq
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Command

```bash
bbq <exact command you ran>
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full output.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Shell: (e.g., bash 5.2, zsh 5.9)
- bq version: (output of `bq version`)
